content:
IVX LANDING PAGE — FINAL CLOSEOUT

Do NOT generate another audit.

The next task is implementation only.

Fix every remaining item, deploy, verify on production, and return evidence.

OPEN ITEMS

- Chrome
- Samsung Internet

- landscape

- hero

- reels

- footer

Safari

keyboard

navigation

reels

Chrome

Safari

No jumping

No layout shifts

No header movement

5.

Developer

Workspace

Analytics
